repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Geneseo Migrant Center records
did.abstract: Research reports, meeting minutes, curricula, newsletters, publications, memos, clippings, photographs, videos, and scrapbooks in binders, documenting the work done at the center.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Research reports, meeting minutes, curricula, newsletters, publications, memos, clippings, photographs, videos, and scrapbooks in binders, documenting the work done at the center.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Geneseo Migrant Center providing a variety of services to migrant farmworkers and their families as well as coordinating programs benefiting migrant workers on a regional, state, and national level. The center was formed in 1967 and closed in June of 2019.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Geneseo Migrant Center records, #8743. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
